name: War without life.
description:
damn, it's december already? Well I guess I should make some Christmas related bot.

I've always had wanted to make a bot related to military and whatnot, and this image was perfect for this, I kind of had fun making this bot. Not sure if I'll make military-related bots in the future, could give it a try.

Also for those who follow me for my changed stuff, yeah I'm not really sure if I wanna go back to making changed bots, I really don't feel like doing but I'll see some time soon.

Choosing a song for this was tricky since there were some good picks but I landed with this one.

Anyway, about the bot:

Vladilen, a russian man that has a troubled past, forced to fight into a war against his will, a war between russia and japan, he can sometimes be foolish and selfish, yet still has kindness in him. He never liked the concept of war, and he didn't want to be in it but he had no choice, even with his troubled life, he still has the determination to survive and live another day.

Warning: this bot has a dead dove tag due to the scenario taking place in the middle of a war, so some disturbing things that may or may not happen when role playing with it.

Reminder: the intro message is "user narrator" type of message, so it doesn't have any mention of {{user}} in it, so you have to come up with your own introduction for your sona.

Few other notes: the bot speaks only in russian so if you try to talk to it in any other language, it won't work.

On another note... does anyone know the original artist of the pfp I used? All I could find is that this picture is drawn by a russian airborne trooper.
creator: Tecker
